decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id (corridor_125th-street-manhattan) already resolves to the correct registry record. Limits 'Amsterdam Avenue to Second Avenue' match that record exactly, and the source_id 2013_06_05_sbs_125th_cb9 appears in its source_ids list. The distinct record corridor_125th-st-manhattan has different limits (Morningside Avenue to Second Avenue) and lacks this source, confirming the observation belongs to its current base_record_id, not that alternate.
